promotions.title: Activate Money Safe Get a Pacific Coffee Voucher
promotions.highlight: ☕ Free Pacific Coffee Voucher when activating Money Safe
promotions.description: Customers who activate the Money Safe feature will receive a Pacific Coffee Voucher. Money Safe provides enhanced protection against fraud losses while allowing customers to earn Savings or Time Deposit rates.

promotions.title: Airstar Bank Visa Platinum Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Unleash limitless stellar services with the Visa Platinum Card
promotions.description: Apply for the Airstar Bank Visa Platinum Card to access premium banking services. The card includes Pay Shield protection that provides 24/7 real-time fraud protection.

promotions.title: Bank Securities Transfer Support
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ 24/7 instant securities transfers in multiple currencies
promotions.description: Transfer securities with support for HKD, USD, and CNY currencies with instant arrival. Available 24/7 for maximum convenience and flexibility.

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Personalized Stellar APR
promotions.highlight: 💰 Loan amounts up to 12x your monthly salary with personalized APR
promotions.description: Apply for a personal loan with personalized stellar APR ranging from 7.43% to 35.05%. Loan amounts up to 12 times monthly salary or HKD1,000,000, whichever is lower. Complete the process from application to disbursement in as fast as 5 minutes.

promotions.title: Fractional Share Investing
promotions.highlight: 🔢 Start investing with just 1 share or as little as US$5
promotions.description: Access fractional share investing, allowing purchases of just 1 share for HK stocks or investments as small as US$5 for US stocks. Makes investing accessible to customers with any budget.

promotions.title: Savings Deposit with No Minimum Balance
promotions.highlight: 💵 No minimum balance requirement for HKD/USD/CNY deposits
promotions.description: Enjoy savings deposits with no minimum balance requirement. Available in HKD, USD, and CNY currencies with competitive interest rates.

promotions.title: Flexible Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: 🕒 Flexible tenors with 24/7 placement for time deposits
promotions.description: Enjoy high-interest time deposits in HKD, USD, and CNY currencies. Offers flexible tenors and 24/7 placement options for maximum convenience.

promotions.title: Mobile Account Opening in 5 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in as fast as 5 minutes via mobile
promotions.description: Support for both Hong Kong residents and visitors in Hong Kong to open accounts via mobile phone. Complete the account opening process in as little as 5 minutes.

promotions.title: Trade Hong Kong & US Stocks Instantly
promotions.highlight: 🌎 Trade stocks with low fees, fractional shares, and global access
promotions.description: Trade Hong Kong and US stocks instantly with competitive low fees. Purchase fractional shares and enjoy global access to diverse investment options.

promotions.title: Forex Trading
promotions.highlight: 💱 24/7 FX service with real-time quotes and instant trading
promotions.description: Access 24/7 foreign exchange services with real-time quotes and instant trading. Support for three currencies: HKD, USD, and CNY with immediate transfers.

promotions.title: Free Instant FPS Transfers
promotions.highlight: ⚡ 24/7 free transfers in HKD, USD and CNY
promotions.description: Transfer money for free in multiple currencies including HKD, USD and CNY. Send funds via mobile numbers, email addresses or account numbers with 24/7 instant transfers for HKD and CNY through the Faster Payment System.

promotions.title: SME Loan Cash Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💵 Enjoy up to HK$100,000 cash rebate on first SME loan drawdown!
promotions.description: New SME customers can receive a cash rebate of up to HK$100,000 upon their first loan drawdown. This limited-time promotion aims to support small and medium enterprises with their financing needs.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account Upgrade
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Support for HKD, RMB, and USD in one account!
promotions.description: The savings account has been upgraded to support multiple currencies including HKD, RMB, and USD. Users can now transfer directly from Deposit Plus to third-party accounts with daily transfer limits increased to up to HK$1 million.

promotions.title: Ant Bank Investment Fund Platform
promotions.highlight: 📈 New investment fund platform now available!
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched a new investment fund platform offering high-quality funds from industry-leading companies including JP Morgan, Allianz, GF Fund, and China AMC. Minimum investment starts from as low as HK$1.

promotions.title: Insurance Products with Premium Rebate
promotions.highlight: 💯 Get 100% premium rebate on selected insurance products!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers insurance products with a 100% premium rebate on selected plans. The service features a simple online application process with premium protection options all in one place.

promotions.title: Secure Storage Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced deposit protection against fraud!
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Secure Storage Service, an anti-fraud measure introduced by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. This service allows users to lock reserve deposits, preventing transfers through any channels including local and cross-border transfers, while still earning interest.

promotions.title: One-Stop Securities Trading Platform
promotions.highlight: 🌎 One-stop Hong Kong and US stock trading platform!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a comprehensive trading platform connecting Hong Kong and US stock markets for global investment opportunities. The service provides access to Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, ETFs and other global investment options with account opening in as fast as 3 minutes.
promotions.quota: Hong Kong residents only (not applicable to mainland and overseas users without Hong Kong resident identity)
promotions.cost: Trading fees apply as per terms and conditions

promotions.title: Balance+ Daily Interest Earning
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to 2.0% p.a. interest daily!
promotions.description: Balance+ offers daily interest earning on your deposits with an annual interest rate of up to 2.0%. The feature allows flexible withdrawal without fees and provides enhanced financial security.

promotions.title: Time Deposit Service
promotions.highlight: 💼 Flexible time deposit with no penalty for early withdrawal!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers time deposit options with customizable deposit periods and no penalty fees for early withdrawal. The service features a low minimum deposit of HK$1 and supports both HKD and USD deposits.

promotions.title: Installment Loan Service
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Simple application with instant fund disbursement!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers installment loans with a simple application process and instant fund disbursement. The service features flexible loan amounts, special low interest rates, and fast approval.

promotions.title: Personal Loan
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Revolving credit line with flexible withdrawals!
promotions.description: Ant Bank's personal loan offers a revolving credit line with flexible withdrawal options and instant fund disbursement. The service features simple application processes and transparent fee structures.

promotions.title: EM+ Daily Interest Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to 2.0% annual interest rate daily!
promotions.description: EM+ allows customers to earn interest daily with an annual interest rate of up to 2.0%. The more you save, the more you earn, with flexible payment options.

promotions.title: Instant Account Opening
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in just 5 minutes with only HKID and mobile number
promotions.description: Fusion Bank offers a streamlined account opening process that takes only 5 minutes. Customers need only their HKID card and mobile number to complete the process, making it faster than the time it takes to prepare a cup of coffee.
promotions.quota: Hong Kong identity card holders aged 18 or above, non-US persons only

promotions.title: Low Entry Investment Options
promotions.highlight: 💰 Start investing with as little as HKD 1
promotions.description: Fusion Bank enables customers to begin their investment journey with just HKD 1. This low entry threshold makes saving and investing accessible for various goals, from travel adventures to personal milestones.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Account Service
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Manage HKD, CNY and USD in one account with instant exchanges
promotions.description: Customers can hold, exchange, spend and transfer in three currencies (HKD, CNY, and USD) through a single account. This service provides real-time exchange capabilities and allows for seamless local transfers in all three currencies.

promotions.title: Global Remittance Service
promotions.highlight: 🌍 Send money globally directly from your smartphone
promotions.description: Fusion Bank offers international money transfer services accessible directly from your smartphone. Customers can buy foreign currency at real-time exchange rates and send funds globally or use them for cashless spending through payment networks.

promotions.title: Deposit Protection Scheme
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Deposits protected up to HKD 800,000 under Hong Kong's DPS
promotions.description: As a licensed digital bank in Hong Kong and a member of Hong Kong's Deposit Protection Scheme, Fusion Bank ensures eligible deposits are protected up to a maximum of HKD 800,000. This provides customers with security and peace of mind for their savings.

promotions.title: Personal Loan Credit Line
promotions.highlight: 💳 Access personal loans with competitive interest rates
promotions.description: Personal loan options with flexible terms and competitive interest rates. Customers can apply for initial loans and top-up loans with different APRs based on loan amount, tenor, and repayment schedule.
promotions.cost: Interest rates starting from daily rate of 0.02%

promotions.title: liviSave Preferential Savings Rate
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn preferential savings rate with no minimum deposit required
promotions.description: Grow your money with liviSave's preferential savings rate. No minimum deposit is required, and account opening is 100% online with a quick and easy process that doesn't need complicated documents.

promotions.title: livi QR Payment Service
promotions.highlight: 📱 Fast and secure QR payments accepted at merchants across Hong Kong
promotions.description: Make quick and secure payments using livi's QR payment functionality. The service is widely accepted by merchants throughout Hong Kong, offering a convenient payment alternative.

promotions.title: Free FPS Instant Transfers
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Fast and free transfers using FPS anytime
promotions.description: Transfer money instantly to anyone at any time using Faster Payment System (FPS). The service is completely free and allows for quick money transfers without any charges.

promotions.title: Pay tax with Mox Credit Card and earn up to HKD500 cash reward
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to HKD500 cash reward when paying tax with Mox Credit
promotions.description: Pay your tax bill with Mox Credit Card and apply for Instalment to split the payment. This helps ease financial pressure while earning up to HKD500 in cash rewards during the second tax instalment period.

promotions.title: Tax Season Instant Loan with APR as low as 1.18%
promotions.highlight: 💸 Get Instant Loan with APR as low as 1.18% plus cash rewards
promotions.description: Apply for a Tax Season Instant Loan with APR as low as 1.18%. The entire process from personalized quotation to instant disbursement is available within the Mox app. Successful applicants can earn up to HKD10,888 cash reward.
promotions.cost: Loan interest with APR as low as 1.18%

promotions.title: Keeta exclusive flash sale with up to HKD80 off
promotions.highlight: ⚡️ Get up to HKD80 off on Keeta orders with Mox Card
promotions.description: Order from Keeta with your Mox Card to enjoy an exclusive discount of up to HKD20 off per order, saving up to HKD80 for the whole month. Additional surprise vouchers and welcome rewards available to enhance your home party experience.

promotions.title: Xiaomi flagship camera phone deal with up to 7% total cash rewards
promotions.highlight: 📷 Get up to 7% cash rewards and 0% instalments on Xiaomi purchases
promotions.description: Shop at mi.com or Xiaomi Stores with Mox Credit Card to unlock up to 5% extra cash rebate (capped at HKD450) plus up to 12-month 0% interest instalments. Combined with standard up to 2% Unlimited CashBack, total rewards reach up to 7%.
promotions.quota: New customers get up to HKD2,150 cash bonus with code XM1500MOX

promotions.title: Mox Journey from Scratch Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💥 Scratch to win up to HKD8,888 in rewards by completing missions
promotions.description: Complete any of five simple challenges to receive a Mox Scratch Card with instant prize reveal. Finishing more challenges multiplies chances to win the top prize of HKD8,888 (HKD8,000 in Solana + HKD888 cash reward).

promotions.title: Indulge and Grow Bonus Deposit Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💵 Deposit your bonus for high interest plus chance to win free lunch
promotions.description: Deposit your bonus into Mox to earn great interest while getting a chance to win a 1-month 'free lunch'. Each HKD 10,000 deposit equals one entry into the lucky draw, increasing chances of winning with higher deposits.
promotions.cost: Minimum deposit of HKD 10,000 for one lucky draw entry

promotions.title: Mox x csl Best-in-Town Exclusive Plan Offer
promotions.highlight: 🤳 Get up to HKD1,380 rebates and free NowTV Pass with csl plans
promotions.description: Sign up for a new plan or renew your existing one with csl while setting up Mox Credit Card autopay. Automatically receive HKD180 monthly fee rebate plus a free Now TV beIN SPORTS Super Pack 1-Month Pass valued at HKD188.
promotions.cost: csl plan subscription with Mox Credit Card autopay

promotions.title: Travel Pick & Go Eggstra Care+ Promotion
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Get FREE add-on coverage with Travel Pick & Go insurance
promotions.description: Apply for Travel Pick & Go insurance during the promotion period to receive 1 FREE add-on coverage. This offer helps safeguard your trip from financial stress caused by unexpected events.

promotions.title: The Club Samsung S26 Series Exclusive Discount
promotions.highlight: 📱 Get HKD100 off new Samsung S26 series at The Club
promotions.description: Spend HKD1,800 or more on The Club with Mox Credit Card and enter promo code CLUBMOX2026 to enjoy an instant HKD100 discount on the new Samsung S26 series. This is in addition to the regular up to 2% Unlimited CashBack on purchases.

promotions.title: Uber Taxi Ride Spending Reward
promotions.highlight: 🚕 Save HKD10 off each Uber Taxi ride per month
promotions.description: Pay for Uber Taxi rides with Mox Card to enjoy HKD10 off each ride per month. Whether visiting family, heading out for the weekend, or catching a flight, this offer helps you save on transportation costs.
promotions.cost: Uber Taxi ride payment with Mox Card

promotions.title: Time Deposit New Customer Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn HKD2,500 cash rewards with new Time Deposit
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account using the invitation code 'MOXDEPO', complete account opening within 15 days, and place a Time Deposit of at least HKD250,000 within 7 days. Maintain this balance until the end of the Hold Fund Period to earn HKD2,500 cash rewards.
promotions.quota: Only for customers who have not held any Mox Account in their name in the 12 months prior to onboarding

promotions.title: Spend & Save Double Rewards with MOXSMART
promotions.highlight: 🛍️ Get 20% CashBack at 5 hot merchants plus 12% p.a. savings rate
promotions.description: New Mox customers can enter invitation code 'MOXSMART' when signing up to enjoy 20% CashBack for a full year when spending at HKTVmall, foodpanda, Uber, Keeta, or Taobao. This is in addition to standard up to 2% Unlimited CashBack on all spending and a total welcome savings rate of 12% p.a. from deposit.

promotions.title: HKT Bill Payment Rewards with MOXBILL26
promotions.highlight: 💳 Earn up to HKD1,200 cash rewards paying HKT bills
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account with the invitation code MOXBILL26, apply for a Mox Credit Card, and pay HKT bills to unlock cash rewards worth up to HKD1,200. Turn regular bill payments into rewarding experiences.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come, first served

promotions.title: Trip.com Exclusive Year-round Offer
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Get up to 8% Off Trip.com bookings plus up to 2% CashBack
promotions.description: Use your Mox Card to book hotels or flights on Trip.com and enjoy up to 8% exclusive discounts. Spending with Mox Credit Card earns an additional up to 2% Unlimited CashBack, making every trip more rewarding throughout the year.

promotions.title: Personal Accident Cushion Double Reward
promotions.highlight: ⚡️ Enjoy up to 2 months of premium rebate on Personal Accident insurance
promotions.description: Apply for Personal Accident Cushion insurance to receive up to 2 months' premium rebate, doubling your reward. Rebate amounts are HKD120 for Value Plan or HKD200 for Max Plan respectively.
promotions.quota: Limited to first 3,000 eligible purchases and customers who had not previously enjoyed rebate from Personal Accident Cushion

promotions.title: Mox Payroll Benefit Program
promotions.highlight: 💸 Get 1.5% p.a. bonus rate on savings & 2% CashBack with payroll
promotions.description: Switch your payroll to Mox to unlock a 1.5% p.a. bonus rate on your HKD/USD Savings Account. Additionally, enjoy unlimited 2% CashBack or HKD4=1 Asia Mile conversion rate on your spending with Mox Credit Card.
promotions.quota: No specific eligibility requirements beyond setting up payroll

promotions.title: Mission Bonus Rate Savings Program
promotions.highlight: 🚀 Stack missions to earn up to 3.5% p.a. on your deposits
promotions.description: Complete 4 easy missions - route payroll, invest, FX, or boost daily balance - to receive a bonus interest rate of up to 3.5% p.a. on eligible HKD or USD savings deposits. Stack any or all missions for instant bonus that lasts until the end of the month.

promotions.title: Mox Referral Programme
promotions.highlight: 👥 Earn rewards by referring friends to Mox
promotions.description: Participate in Mox's referral program to earn rewards when friends join using your referral code. The program is described as easy to share and easy to earn, making it a simple way to be rewarded for growing the Mox community.

promotions.title: The Club Linkage Offer with CLUBLINK
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Earn rewards worth up to HKD1,400 with CLUBLINK code
promotions.description: New customers can open a Mox Account with the code 'CLUBLINK', link their Mox Card to The Club account, and apply for a Mox Credit Card to earn up to HKD1,400 worth of rewards. An exclusive offer connecting Mox with The Club membership benefits.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come, first served. New customers only.
promotions.cost: Account opening and card linking requirements

promotions.title: Mox Zone on The Club
promotions.highlight: 🛍️ Enjoy exclusive year-round discounts on 100+ popular gadgets
promotions.description: Mox Zone has officially launched on The Club platform, giving Mox customers exclusive year-round discounts on over 100 popular gadgets. Additional benefits include free delivery on orders of HKD400 or more.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come, first served

promotions.title: Asia Miles Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn Asia Miles through Time Deposits for your next trip
promotions.description: Set up a Mox Time Deposit to earn Asia Miles for travel. For example, an Asia Miles Time Deposit of HKD104,000 new fund for 12 months will earn 26,000 Asia Miles, enough for a round-trip flight to Tokyo, Osaka or other Asian destinations.

promotions.title: FlexiBoost Savings
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn guaranteed interest rates that won't change with market fluctuations
promotions.description: FlexiBoost offers stable interest rates that don't change regardless of market conditions. This new savings solution allows customers to watch their wealth grow through progressively higher interest rates as their savings increase.

promotions.title: New FX Users Cash Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💱 Get up to HKD175 cash rewards as a new FX user
promotions.description: New users of Mox FX can earn up to HKD175 in cash rewards when trading FX, making investments, or sending money overseas. This offer aims to introduce customers to the FX capabilities of the Mox platform.
promotions.cost: FX transactions, investment or overseas money transfers

promotions.title: Mox Credit Card Miles Rewards Scheme
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn HKD4=1 Asia Mile on all spending with 0% FX Fees
promotions.description: Earn Asia Miles at an unbeatable rate of HKD4=1 on all spending with Mox Credit Card's Miles Rewards Scheme. Additional benefits include 0% FX Fees on foreign transactions and the flexibility to switch between CashBack and Asia Miles rewards schemes.

promotions.title: Unlimited CashBack with Mox Credit Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Earn 2% Unlimited CashBack everywhere and 3% at supermarkets
promotions.description: Earn 2% Unlimited CashBack on all purchases with Mox Credit Card, plus elevated 3% Unlimited CashBack specifically at supermarkets in Hong Kong. All CashBack is provided as real cash, calculated instantly and credited to your Mox Account daily.

promotions.title: HKT Shopping Reward with MOXHKT25
promotions.highlight: 🛒 Get HKD1,400 in rewards shopping at HKT with MOXHKT25 code
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account with invitation code 'MOXHKT25', link Mox Card, and apply for Mox Credit Card to instantly receive 2,000 Clubpoints. Earn additional cash rewards up to HKD1,000 by spending HKD1,000 in one transaction at csl shop/1O1O Center/csl eshop or subscribing to HKT service.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come, first served
promotions.cost: Minimum spend of HKD1,000 in one transaction at specified merchants

promotions.title: Instant Interest on Time Deposits
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Earn interest instantly on HKD and USD Time Deposits
promotions.description: Unlike traditional banks, Mox pays interest at the exact moment of deposit rather than making customers wait. This feature is available for both HKD Time Deposits and the brand-new USD Time Deposit feature.

promotions.title: Instant Clear 0% Interest Installment Plan
promotions.highlight: 💳 Pay other banks' credit card bills with 0% interest installments
promotions.description: Enjoy 0% interest with only a one-off fee when paying other banks' or financial institutions' credit card bills below HKD75,000. The amount can be paid in easy installments of 3 to 6 months, making external card bill clearance more flexible.

promotions.title: Year-round Mox Credit Card Offers
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Access exclusive year-round offers with Mox Credit Card
promotions.description: Mox Credit Card holders can enjoy fabulous year-round offers across various merchants and categories. These offers come with the additional benefit of earning Unlimited CashBack or Unlimited Miles on all qualifying purchases.

promotions.title: New Customer Welcome Offer with 1500MOX
promotions.highlight: 💵 Earn up to HKD1,500 cash reward + access to 2% Unlimited CashBack
promotions.description: New customers who use invitation code '1500MOX' to open a Mox account and apply for a Mox Credit Card can earn up to HKD1,500 in cash rewards by meeting spending requirements at any merchant in Hong Kong. For a limited time, unlock 2% Unlimited CashBack or HKD4=1 mile with no balance requirement.

promotions.title: Trip.com Welcome Offer with MOXTRIP25
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to HKD1,700 cash rewards + up to 2% CashBack on Trip.com
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account with code 'MOXTRIP25', apply for a Mox Credit Card, and complete simple tasks to earn up to HKD1,700 in cash rewards. Additionally, earn up to 2% CashBack with Mox Credit Card on every Trip.com booking.

promotions.title: Fast Account Opening Service
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in as fast as 3 minutes
promotions.description: Streamlined digital account opening process that takes as little as 3 minutes to complete for standard cases. No minimum balance requirement and no paperwork or queuing needed.

promotions.title: 24/7 Digital Banking Services
promotions.highlight: 🕗 Complete banking services available 24 hours a day
promotions.description: Access all banking services through the mobile app at any time of day or night. Includes deposits, transfers, cross border payments and foreign exchange capabilities.

promotions.title: Time Deposits for Growth
promotions.highlight: 💰 Steady and reliable growth with time deposits
promotions.description: Time deposit products designed to provide stable returns on savings. Digital management of deposit accounts for convenient wealth growth.

promotions.title: Integrated Investment Services
promotions.highlight: 📈 Banking security combined with brokerage-grade trading
promotions.description: Dual-strength investment account offering both banking security and powerful trading capabilities. Seamlessly switch between investments and deposits with a unified platform.

promotions.title: Global Investment Access
promotions.highlight: 🌎 Access to HK stocks, US stocks, funds and money market funds
promotions.description: Comprehensive investment platform providing access to multiple global markets including Hong Kong and US stocks, as well as diversified funds and money market funds.

promotions.title: Extended US Stock Trading Hours
promotions.highlight: 🕘 16-hour daily US stock trading with analytics
promotions.description: Extended trading hours for US stocks with advanced analytics tools to help make informed investment decisions. Provides flexibility for trading across different time zones.

promotions.title: Comprehensive Digital Insurance Services
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ Simple digital application for diverse insurance products
promotions.description: Comprehensive range of insurance products including life, savings, motor, home and travel insurance. Applications can be completed entirely through the integrated mobile app.

promotions.title: Personalized Wealth Advisory Services
promotions.highlight: 👨‍💼 One-to-one tailored advisory services
promotions.description: Personalized consultation services for wealth management and legacy planning. Expert advisors help customers develop customized insurance and wealth protection strategies.

promotions.title: Banking Services for Hong Kong Visitors
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Banking services for visitors in Hong Kong
promotions.description: Banking services available to visiting customers who are physically present in Hong Kong. Allows non-residents to access financial services during their stay in the territory.
promotions.quota: Visitors physically present in Hong Kong

promotions.title: No Minimum Balance Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💰 Zero minimum balance required for accounts
promotions.description: Maintain banking accounts with Ping An Digital Bank without any minimum balance requirement. This offers flexibility for customers to manage their finances without balance-related fees or restrictions.

promotions.title: WeLab Global Wallet
promotions.highlight: 💱 Compare and access the best exchange rates
promotions.description: WeLab Global Wallet allows customers to compare and access competitive foreign exchange rates. The service enables users to manage multiple currencies within one account for global financial needs.

promotions.title: GoSave 2.0
promotions.highlight: 💰 Enhanced savings product with competitive interest rates
promotions.description: GoSave 2.0 is an improved savings product offering competitive interest rates. It utilizes AI technology to help customers maximize their savings potential with a user-friendly approach.

promotions.title: Transfer/FPS/Remittance Services
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Quick and convenient money transfers
promotions.description: WeLab Bank offers seamless money transfer services including local transfers, Faster Payment System (FPS), and remittance options. These services provide customers with flexible ways to move their money efficiently.

promotions.title: Onboarding Money Safe
promotions.highlight: 🔐 Special security features for new customers
promotions.description: The Onboarding Money Safe provides enhanced security features for new WeLab Bank customers. This service helps protect customers' funds with advanced security measures during the account setup process.

promotions.title: Digital Wealth Advisory
promotions.highlight: 🤖 AI-powered investment advice tailored to your needs
promotions.description: Digital Wealth Advisory uses advanced AI technology to provide personalized investment recommendations. The service helps customers make informed investment decisions based on their financial goals and risk tolerance.
promotions.cost: Free advisory service, investment costs may apply

promotions.title: WeLab Money Plus
promotions.highlight: ✨ Enhanced financial product with premium benefits
promotions.description: WeLab Money Plus is a premium financial product that offers enhanced benefits for savings and investments. It's designed to help customers optimize their wealth growth with additional advantages compared to standard accounts.

promotions.title: Featured Funds with $0 Subscription and Switching Fees
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Invest in top funds with zero subscription and switching fees
promotions.description: WeLab Bank offers a selection of Featured Funds from world-leading fund companies with $0 subscription and switching fees. This enables customers to build diversified investment portfolios without paying traditional transaction fees.
promotions.cost: Free subscription and switching, investment amount required

promotions.title: Personal Instalment Loan
promotions.highlight: 💸 Flexible personal loans with competitive rates
promotions.description: WeLab Bank offers Personal Instalment Loans with competitive interest rates and flexible repayment options. The service provides customers with quick access to funds for various personal financial needs.

promotions.title: Card Debt Consolidation Loan
promotions.highlight: 💯 Simplify multiple card debts into one manageable loan
promotions.description: The Card Debt Consolidation Loan helps customers combine multiple credit card debts into a single loan with potentially lower interest rates. This service aims to simplify debt management and reduce overall interest costs.

promotions.title: Subscribe+ for Apple Products
promotions.highlight: 📱 Finance Apple products with flexible payment plans
promotions.description: Subscribe+ allows customers to purchase Apple products with flexible payment options. This financing service makes premium Apple devices more accessible through manageable installment plans.

promotions.title: Learn Now Pay Later Program
promotions.highlight: 📚 Access education with deferred payment options
promotions.description: The Learn Now Pay Later Program enables customers to access educational opportunities with deferred payment options. This financing solution helps make learning and skills development more financially manageable.

promotions.title: Policy Loan
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Unlock the value of your insurance policies
promotions.description: Policy Loans allow customers to borrow against the value of their insurance policies. This service provides financial flexibility by enabling customers to access funds without surrendering their insurance coverage.

promotions.title: StockBack x ZA Card
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Get free stocks when making purchases with ZA Card
promotions.description: Hong Kong's first StockBack program allows you to earn stocks directly through card spending. Instead of points, you accumulate actual stock shares and can build a personalized reward package through your daily spending.

promotions.title: PowerDraw Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💰 Win up to 200% rebate on your spending
promotions.description: Participate in PowerDraw by spending with your ZA Card and get a chance to win up to a 200% rebate. Each transaction gives you an opportunity to boost your rewards through this lucky draw mechanism.

promotions.title: Zero Platform Fee for New Crypto Customers
promotions.highlight: 🪙 $0 platform fee for crypto trading for 90 days
promotions.description: New customers can enjoy zero platform fees for cryptocurrency trading during their first 90 days after account opening. Trade 24/7 directly with HKD or USD deposits with no additional platform charges.

promotions.title: Free Instant FPS Transfers
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Send and receive money instantly for free
promotions.description: Enjoy free instant transfers, card payments, tax payments, and scan-to-pay all in one app. Receive HKD and CNY with just your mobile phone number via FPS and send Group Lai See with one tap.

promotions.title: Custom Card Number
promotions.highlight: 🔢 Choose your own 6-digit card number
promotions.description: ZA Bank is the first in Hong Kong to allow customers to choose the last 6 digits on their card face. Personalize your Visa debit card with your preferred numbers at no additional cost.

promotions.title: Free ATM Cash Withdrawals
promotions.highlight: 💵 Free cash withdrawals at over 3,000 Visa ATMs
promotions.description: Withdraw cash for free at over 3,000 Visa ATMs throughout Hong Kong with your ZA Card. This service allows convenient access to your funds without incurring additional withdrawal fees.

promotions.title: Payment Connect: Zero-Fee Real-Time Transfers
promotions.highlight: 🇨🇳 Real-time money transfers between Mainland China and Hong Kong
promotions.description: Send money between Chinese Mainland and Hong Kong in real-time with zero fees using Payment Connect. This service provides a seamless way to transfer funds across these regions without incurring additional costs.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Hold 11 different currencies in one account
promotions.description: Hold 11 different currencies including HKD, CNY, USD, GBP, SGD, EUR, CAD, AUD, JPY, NZD, and CHF in a single account. Exchange currencies 24/7 at your preferred rates to seize market opportunities and grow your wealth.

promotions.title: Fast Loan Approval
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Get loan approval results in as fast as 90 seconds
promotions.description: Apply for loans with a simple application process and receive preliminary approval results in as fast as 90 seconds for new customers and 30 seconds for existing users. Loans of up to HKD 1,000,000 are available.

promotions.title: Year-Round Travel Offers
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Exclusive travel discounts and benefits
promotions.description: ZA Card provides year-round travel offers for cardholders. These travel benefits are designed to enhance your travel experience and provide cost savings for frequent travelers.

promotions.title: Quick Insurance Application
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ Get insured in as fast as 3 minutes
promotions.description: Complete insurance applications in as fast as 3 minutes via your smartphone. Choose from a range of options including life insurance, critical illness insurance, and Voluntary Health Insurance Scheme (VHIS).

promotions.title: Zero Subscription Fee on All Funds
promotions.highlight: 🔄 0% subscription fees on ALL funds with no cap
promotions.description: Enjoy zero subscription fees on all funds with no cap. This allows 100% of your money to go directly into the market instead of being lost to fees, maximizing your investment potential.

promotions.title: Zero Brokerage and Custody Fees for Stocks
promotions.highlight: 💹 Trade stocks with 0 brokerage and 0 custody fees
promotions.description: Trade stocks with zero brokerage and zero custody fees, with platform fees as low as USD 1.99/HKD 18 per transaction. This significantly reduces the cost of stock trading compared to traditional brokers.
promotions.cost: Platform fee as low as USD 1.99/HKD 18 per transaction

promotions.title: High Interest Savings
promotions.highlight: 💰 Enjoy high-interest savings with flexible deposits and withdrawals
promotions.description: A dedicated savings pot designed for your needs with high interest rates. Deposit and withdraw anytime with zero fees, making it both flexible and rewarding for your savings.
